title: trifolium dichotomum
intro: Trifolium dichotomum, also known as sainfoin or holy clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Trifolium dichotomum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trifolium dichotomum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
